name: Otto Kretschmer
longDesc: Commandant du U-99, Otto Kretschmer est l'as des U-Boote avec plus de 270 000 tonnes coulées en 1940-1941. En WC4, carte navale tier-S or à envoyer sur les scénarios Atlantique Nord : bonus de dégâts sous-marins très marqués, idéal pour rompre les convois alliés.

skills.name: Ace Submarine
skills.desc: Submarine units under command (excluding nuclear submarines) ignores enemy defense, and their attack range is increased by 1; after eliminating an enemy, there is a 75% chance to attack again, and the chance can be increased by an additional 25% if a critical attack is dealt.

skills.name: Submergence Evasion
skills.desc: Submarine units under command receive 21% less damage and have a 50% chance to dodge when attacked by airstrike or missile. Submarine recover 5% of its maximum HP each turn.

skills.name: Inferior Victory
skills.desc: Damage is increased by 12% when the number of troop formations under command is 1.

skills.name: Fleet Leader
skills.desc: 24% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding ship units

skills.name: Sailor
skills.desc: Counter attack +18% when attacked by the enemy at sea

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Commander of U-99, Otto Kretschmer is the top-scoring U-boat ace with over 270,000 tons sunk in 1940–41. In WC4 he is a tier-S gold navy card for the North Atlantic scenarios: pronounced submarine damage bonuses that make him ideal for breaking Allied convoys.
longDescDe: Otto Kretschmer, Kommandant der U-99, ist mit über 270.000 versenkten Tonnen 1940/41 das erfolgreichste U-Boot-Ass. In WC4 ist er eine S-Klasse-Gold-Marine-Karte für die Nordatlantik-Szenarien: starke U-Boot-Schadensboni machen ihn ideal zum Brechen alliierter Konvois.
